message:
fix(codegen): Fix multiple compile errors affecting core2 tests

- Fix double-label syntax (cf: blk:) in chained subscript LHS
  - genSubscriptLHS now checks for unknown container types before
    emitting base expression, avoiding invalid "expr: blk:" syntax

- Fix string key "1" being treated as tuple index (.1)
  - Added first-char digit check to is_valid_ident validation
  - Numeric string keys now correctly use .get("1").? instead of .1

- Fix function definitions inside struct initializers (hashlib)
  - try-except handlers with function_def now hoist to module level
  - Added mode check to only generate functions when at module level
  - Functions are skipped in handler body after hoisting

- Add detectOptionalFromImportPattern for "from X import ..." pattern
  - Handles fallback definitions when module is unavailable

- Fix containsRaiseOrExprStmt to recursively check all statement types
  - Corrected field names: else_body, orelse_body, finalbody
